action_scenario: sitting on the edge of a fountain in a public square, full-body shot, face visible

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their forties, of Northern European descent, with short black hair and deep dark eyes, a calm, neutral expression. soft daylight from a north-facing window. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A full-body shot of a female-presenting individual in their early 40s, fair skin, with a slightly angular jawline and a heart-shaped face, sitting casually on the edge of a large public fountain. She has short, dark brown hair with soft waves, styled in a side part. Her eyes are light hazel, slightly downturned, and set closer together than average. Her nose has a delicate, upturned bridge and a pointed tip. Her lips are full and slightly parted, showing a hint of a gentle, bemused smile. She has a neutral, contemplative expression, looking off to the side. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
